# launchdarkly_release_pipeline (Data Source)

Provides a LaunchDarkly release pipeline data source.

~> **Beta:** This data source wraps a beta LaunchDarkly API. Beta resources may change or be removed in future versions.

This data source allows you to retrieve release pipeline information from a LaunchDarkly project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "launchdarkly_release_pipeline" "checkout_rollout" {
  project_key = "example-project"
  key         = "checkout-rollout"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The unique key that references the release pipeline.
- `project_key` (String) The release pipeline's project key.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The release pipeline's creation date represented as a UNIX-style timestamp, in milliseconds since the epoch.
- `description` (String) A description of the release pipeline's purpose.
- `id` (String) The ID in the format `project_key/key`.
- `is_project_default` (Boolean) Whether this release pipeline is the default pipeline for its project.
- `name` (String) A human-friendly name for the release pipeline.
- `phases` (Attributes List) An ordered list of the release pipeline's phases. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases))
- `tags` (Set of String) Tags associated with the release pipeline.
- `version` (Number) The version of the release pipeline.

<a id="nestedatt--phases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases`

Read-Only:

- `audiences` (Attributes List) An ordered list of the audiences for this phase. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--audiences))
- `name` (String) The release phase name.

<a id="nestedatt--phases--audiences"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.audiences`

Read-Only:

- `configuration` (Attributes) Release strategy and approval configuration for this audience. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--audiences--configuration))
- `environment_key` (String) The key of the LaunchDarkly environment this audience targets.
- `name` (String) The audience name.
- `segment_keys` (Set of String) Segment keys targeted by this audience.

<a id="nestedatt--phases--audiences--configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.audiences.configuration`

Read-Only:

- `notify_member_ids` (Set of String) Member IDs notified to review the approval request.
- `notify_team_keys` (Set of String) Team keys whose members are notified to review the approval request.
- `release_strategy` (String) The release strategy for this audience.
- `require_approval` (Boolean) Whether this audience requires approval before changes are rolled out.
